name: Become the leader! (RPG) / Strategy bot
description:
Simulate being a leader and ruling your own country! This bot is still work in progress, so please leave reviews for ways I can improve it.
Latest update: Added an extra instruction for the bot to make the game more unpredictable.

Note: I've noticed the bot has reached 50k messages, which is a big milestone for me! Thank you to everyone who've showed me support with this bot.
creator: raketa20b2
